Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze User Input Input Text A detailed multi step description of a property onboarding process for a large scale property management company Key Stages Mentioned 1 Initial contact documentation review property coordinator 2 Data entry into central database 3 Property manager assignment based on workload geography experience landlord requirements 4 Introductory meeting call align expectations special conditions 5 Scheduling photographer inspector 6 Handling inspection issues repairs contractors 7 Marketing creation pricing model updates 8 Activation in rental portal internal systems 9 Tenant screening lease negotiation credit checks employment references promotions prioritization 10 Lease finalization deposit collection move in scheduling 11 Quality checks audits compliance financial IT Cross cutting elements Decision points internal external stakeholders exceptions special insurance custom clauses communication tracking email CRM PM tools Task Generate a list of targeted open ended questions to clarify and improve understanding of the process Focus on missing details decision criteria roles responsibilities timing sequencing exception handling NO SQL implementation details Conceptual understanding only

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Identify Gaps Areas for Clarification Documentation Review What exactly constitutes outdated vs missing Who verifies compliance What happens if a landlord refuses to update docs Database Entry Who verifies data accuracy Is there a standard template How is data validated before after entry Manager Assignment How are conflicts resolved if multiple managers qualify Is there a formal scoring weighting system Whats the backup if the assigned manager leaves Intro Meeting Is it mandatory Whats the output deliverable How are agreements documented Photographer Inspector Who schedules them Is there a preferred vendor list What are the SLAs timelines for these visits Inspection Issues Whats the threshold for delaying onboarding vs proceeding with conditions Who approves repair budgets How are contractors vetted Marketing Pricing How often are pricing models updated Who approves the final listing What happens if the landlord disagrees with the suggested price Activation What exactly triggers activation Is there a checklist Can activation be partial Tenant Screening What are the exact screening criteria Who makes the final tenant selection How are disputes handled if multiple applicants are equally qualified Lease Finalization Who drafts the lease How are custom clauses reviewed approved Whats the process for security deposit handling escrow timing Quality Checks Audits Are these concurrent or sequential What happens if an audit fails Is there a formal sign off process Communication Tracking How is handoff managed between roles Whats the single source of truth How are escalations handled Timing Sequencing Whats the typical end to end timeline Are any steps parallelizable What are the bottlenecks Exceptions How are special insurance requirements handled Whats the approval workflow for custom lease clauses Are there properties that get fast tracked or delayed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Draft Questions Iterative Refinement aiming for open ended targeted conceptual Group by theme for structure but present as a cohesive list

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review Refine Self Correction Verification against Prompt Targeted Open ended Yes all start with Could you walk me through How does What happens if Uncovers missing details Yes data validation audit timing activation criteria approval authorities Understand decision criteria Yes manager assignment weighting inspection deal breakers pricing disagreements tenant selection thresholds Clarify roles responsibilities Yes who approves repairs who signs off on tenants who handles custom clauses Verify timing sequencing Yes end to end timeline parallel vs sequential audits bottlenecks Learn about exception handling Yes landlord refusal custom clauses post signing audit failures edge cases NO SQL implementation details Checked Purely process conceptual Tone Format Professional structured ready for an interview context

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: One minor adjustment Ensure the phrasing strictly avoids any technical system implementation hints instead of how does the CRM handle use what mechanisms do you use to track the drafted questions already do this well

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill structure the output clearly perhaps with thematic headings for readability but present them as a cohesive list of questions Ill also add a brief introductory concluding remark if needed but keep the focus on the questions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final check of the prompt Please produce a list of targeted open ended questions you would ask the interviewee to enhance your clarity on this complex property onboarding process I will deliver exactly that

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction Refinement during thought I should make sure the questions dont sound too leading Ill adjust phrasing slightly to be more exploratory For example instead of What specific criteria Ill use How do you determine or Could you elaborate on how The current draft is already quite good Ill ensure each question explicitly ties back to the prompts requested focus areas Ill present them as a clean numbered list for ease of use in an interview setting Ill group them thematically but keep the numbering continuous All good
